ksa_text: Skill in producing data quality reporting for business and governance audiences, translating technical quality metrics into business risk and operational impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-009 (DQ, Skill) maps to Performance Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4564 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.456, nist_ai_rmf=0.434, nice=0.416. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4564 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4564 with signal across ddat=0.456, nist_ai_rmf=0.434, nice=0.416 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4564, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
